arts.ttl: ‘He’s an important player for us’ - Flick wants Barça to renew Iñigo’s contract
arts.sum: After an injury-riddled first season the veteran defender is finally healthy and was given a big boost of confidence by new manager Hansi Flick, who made it clear from the start that he counted on Iñigo to play big minutes and mentor the very young players around him. Flick was asked about Martínez in a press conference on Saturday and made it clear that he would like to see Iñigo sign a new deal with the club, so that the coach can continue to count on his experience and talent beyond just this season.

arts.ttl: Nike to Collab With Kobe Bryant for Barcelona 25-26 Away Kit and Special 'Mamba' Collection
arts.sum: Nike will team up with Kobe Bryant to launch the Barcelona 25-26 away kit and full collection exclusively named as Mamba collection for the 2025-2026 season.

Barcelona have announced that they have reached an agreement with Nike over a new €1.7 billion kit sponsorship deal. Despite public differences between the club and the American company, the two have agreed to put pen to paper on a lucrative new deal for the Catalans, which will go a long way towards providing the necessary funds to put them back on an even keel financially.
